---
title: "Baldwin John Pollexfen Bastard"
---

## Baldwin John Pollexfen Bastard

**Dates:** (1830-1905)

### Biography

He succeeded his brother Edmund Bastard in the Kitley estates.

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
